title: Authority for assessment to be made executory
doc_html:
§1745.  Authority for assessment to be made executory

Assessments being tantamount to and the equivalent of judgments may be made executory in any Louisiana court of competent jurisdiction.

Acts 1989, No. 350, §1, eff. Jan. 1, 1990.
